name: Reno Red Chili
recipeIngredient: 6 Dried chili pods (seeded and de-stemmed), boiled for 30 minutes
3 oz Bottle of New Mexico pepper
1 tsp Tabasco sauce, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown meat in oil or fat, adding black pepper to taste. Drain the meat.
2. Add chili powder, cumin, MSG, garlic, and chopped onion. Cook for 30-45 minutes using as little liquid as possible. Add water only if necessary. Stir often.
3. Remove skins from boiled chile pods. Mash the pulp and add it to the meat mixture.
4. Strain oregano tea then add it along with paprika, vinegar, 2/3 of the beef broth, green chiles, stewed tomatoes, and Tabasco sauce. Simmer for 30-45 minutes. Stir often.
5. Dissolve masa flour into remaining beef broth then pour into chili. Simmer another 30 minutes, stirring often.
Makes 1 potful.
